text: products (Khaini, Zarda, Paan masala) and consumption of alcohol. /c173Check regularly for blood sugar, lipids and blood pressure after the age of 30 years at least every 6 months. /c173Avoid self medication. /c173Adopt stress management techniques (Yoga and Meditation). /c179Iodine is required for formation of thyroid hormones. /c179Thyroid hormones are necessary for growth and development. /c179Iodine deficiency leads to goitre (enlargement of thyroid gland) /c179Lack of iodine in the water and diet is the main cause of iodine deficiency disorders. /c179Iodine deficiency during pregnancy results in still births, abortions and cretinism. /c179Use of iodized salt ensures adequate iodine intake.
